description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist, boxy design. The exterior is finished in a light gray concrete or stucco, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. Large rectangular windows are arranged asymmetrically on the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front features a covered carport with space for two vehicles, and the property is bordered by a tiled driveway and small landscaped areas with trees and plants. The main entrance is recessed and partially sheltered, contributing to the clean lines of the structure. The overall aesthetic is functional and urban, with an emphasis on geometric forms and open space.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, light gray exterior, and asymmetrical windows. Features a covered carport, tiled driveway, and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport with two parked cars, main entrance, and landscaping with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain gray wall, minimal windows, and a single tree along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a balcony, additional windows, and tiled ground with more visible landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport from the side, more windows, and two small palm trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, no steps, and a covered carport integrated into the facade.
